title: PortfolioFitAssessment
description: Schema for the portfolio-fit command output. Assesses whether adding a specific security is suitable for a client given their mandate constraints, risk profile, and current portfolio composition.

client_id.description: Unique CRM identifier for the client.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol of the security being assessed.

company_name.description: Full company name of the security being assessed.

assessed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this assessment was generated.

client_snapshot.description: Key client parameters used as inputs to the assessment.

risk_rating.description: Client's current risk rating from their suitability profile.

key_constraints.description: Active mandate constraints that are relevant to this assessment (e.g. excluded sectors, max concentration limits).

current_exposure.description: Client's existing exposure to this security, its sector, and related geography before any new position.

ticker_current_pct.description: Current portfolio weight in this specific ticker as a percentage (0 if not held).

sector_current_pct.description: Current portfolio weight in the security's GICS sector as a percentage.

geography_current_pct.description: Current portfolio weight in the security's primary geography as a percentage.

correlated_holdings.description: Other holdings in the portfolio that are highly correlated or in the same sector/theme.

concentration_impact.description: Projected portfolio concentration after a hypothetical addition of this security.

projected_ticker_pct.description: Projected portfolio weight in this ticker after addition (assumes a standard position size).

within_mandate.description: True if the projected concentrations remain within the client's mandate limits.

concentration_flags.description: Specific concentration limits that would be breached or approached (e.g. 'Single-name limit 5%: projected 6.2%').

diversification_assessment.description: Qualitative assessment of whether adding this security improves portfolio diversification.

adds_diversification.description: True if this security introduces new sector, geographic, or factor exposure not well-represented in the current portfolio.

correlation_note.description: Brief note on how this security correlates with the existing portfolio (e.g. high correlation with existing tech holdings).

rationale.description: 1–3 sentence narrative on the diversification impact.

fit_verdict.description: Overall portfolio fit verdict for this client-security pairing.

fit_rationale.description: Plain-English explanation of the fit verdict, referencing the specific factors that drove the assessment.

suitability_framing.description: RM-safe language suitable for use in a client conversation. Avoids prohibited phrases and is framed as a discussion point rather than a recommendation.

risks_to_discuss.description: Risks the RM should proactively raise with the client in relation to this security.

relevance_to_client.description: Why this risk is particularly relevant given the client's profile or existing portfolio.

compliance_flags.description: Specific compliance items that must be addressed before this security can be discussed or transacted.

flag_type.description: Category of compliance flag (e.g. excluded_sector, mandate_breach, suitability_gap, client_restriction).

description.description: Detailed description of the compliance concern.

action_required.description: Specific action the RM must take to resolve this flag before proceeding.

disclaimer.description: Standard regulatory disclaimer to be presented with this assessment. Must not be removed or modified.
